column3: Open the supplier request, and take note of the high level reason for the cancellation. Common themes will include: Delivery Scheduling Contact Failures Refusal of Delivery at DOD Refusal/cancellation of delivery prior to DOD

Cancel Impacted PO(s) utilizing the following WIMS Wizard Path Select Eligible Item If delivered status is indicated: Select No to "Does the customer have the item?" Select Customer Contact Reason: Notified of Delay/Issue Select Issue Diagnosis Reason as appropriate : Failed/no delivery attempt or Returned to Sender Click Continue Select Resolution: Cancel Item(s) Select Cancellation Reason: Other REQUIRED: Please leave a note on the order clarifying the reason for cancellation ( Visual 2 shows how this translates in the order notes). Click Toggle on Send Confirmation Email (do not send) Click Submit When the wizard wrap pops, click Do Not Wrap and Submit
Respond to the supplier utilizing the Serta/Simmons Reports PO Undeliverable/RTS template, and close the ticket out under the Done status.
